title: Protection From Jahannam
summary: A supplication of the servants of Ar-Rahman asking Allah to turn away the punishment of Jahannam.
repeat_guidance: No fixed repetition count is attached in this entry.

supplications.arabic: رَبَّنَا اصْرِفْ عَنَّا عَذَابَ جَهَنَّمَ إِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَامًا إِنَّهَا سَاءَتْ مُسْتَقَرًّا وَمُقَامًا
supplications.transliteration: Rabbana isrif anna adhaba Jahannam. Inna adhabaha kana gharama. Innaha sa'at mustaqarran wa muqama.
supplications.translation: Our Lord, turn away from us the punishment of Hell. Indeed, its punishment is clinging; indeed, it is evil as a settlement and residence.
